Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Expert Witness Disclosure List
Off Calendar Dec-04-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. HAIG ARSEN HARRIS, JR., ESQ. of Law Offices of Scampini, Mortara & Harris, Tel No. 415-421-8556 appearing for the Plaintiff;
Atty. ARTHUR J. CASEY, ESQ. of Robinson & Wood, Inc., Tel No. 408-298-7120 appearing for Defendant Costco Wholesale Corporation.

Court's tentative ruling required parties to appear at hearing. Both sides stipulate to the matter being heard by the pro tem judge. Matter argued and submitted by counsel. The Court rules as follows: DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S Motion To Augment Expert Witness Disclosure List to disclose Thomas G. Sampson, M.D. is granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge Pro Tem: David McDonald, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Augment Expert Witness Disclosure List
Off Calendar Nov-23-2015 Continued To Dec-24-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT COSTCO WHOLESALE CORPORATION'S Motion To Augment Expert Witness Disclosure List is continued to December 24, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 301, Discovery, to give all Parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. All Parties must deliver courtesy copies of their respective papers to Pro Tem Discovery Judge Douglas Robbins, 1 Post Street Suite 800, San Francisco, CA, 94104, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than November 23 at 4:00 pm or the Motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per California Rules of Court 3.1110(f). Judge Pro Tem: Douglas Robbins, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/JPT)
